name: Apple Chess Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the sugar, margarine, flour, and eggs until smooth.
2. Fold in the chopped apples and cinnamon.
3. Pour the mixture into an 8 inch unbaked pie shell.
4. Bake for 10 minutes at 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
5. Reduce the temperature to 325 degrees Fahrenheit and bake for an additional 40 minutes.
